category_sources: Official GitHub README says Retire.js identifies JavaScript library versions with known vulnerabilities.
source_facts.description says Retire.js scans JavaScript libraries with known vulnerabilities.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Retire.js.
source_facts.homepage uses the Retire.js project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents command-line scanner, SBOM generation, browser extensions, and integrations.
source_facts.homepage is the official project site.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository RetireJS/retire.js matches source_facts.homepage and project description.
Official README About section links retirejs.github.io/retire.js as the project site.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics and README mention security, scanner, vulnerable libraries, software composition analysis, and SBOM generation.
